brain_artifacts_created_or_updated.content_summary: BlueEdge selector model: current_run=run_be_orchestrated_fixup_01 (CANONICAL_ORCHESTRATED). run_blueedge_rerun_01 is CANONICAL_BASELINE_REFERENCE. run_be_orchestrated_01 is REJECTED_NON_CANONICAL. Selector is updated by orchestrator Phase 9 and lens_report_generator._write_canonical_run_metadata.

Canonical output requires: active_pressure_signals=3 (PSIG-001+002+004 only), PSIG-006 as THEORETICAL_BASELINE/telemetry, 1 pressure zone (PZ-001/DOM-04/COMPOUND_ZONE), score=60/CONDITIONAL/INVESTIGATE. Schema bridge must exclude THEORETICAL_BASELINE from active_pressure_signals count.

BlueEdge canonical pipeline: Phases 1-4 automated. Phase 5 STAGE_NOT_AUTOMATED (FastAPI conformance path in source_manifest). Phase 6+7 STAGE_NOT_AUTOMATED (conformance artifacts loaded, run_end_to_end.py bypassed). Phase 8a reads signal_registry_fastapi_compatible.json directly. Phases 8b-9 automated. Key field: fastapi_conformance_path in source_manifest.json.

Documents run_be_orchestrated_01 rejection (STRUCTURAL_TOPOLOGY_DELTA + SCHEMA_BRIDGE_BUG), fixup via fastapi_conformance_path pattern, parity achieved in run_be_orchestrated_fixup_01, FastAPI status progression to ALLOWED_AFTER_OPERATOR_APPROVAL.

LENS report family: Tier-1 Evidence Brief, Tier-1 Narrative Brief, Tier-2 Diagnostic Narrative, Decision Surface. Generated by lens_report_generator.py. Signal display: PSIG-006 always rendered as BASELINE regardless of vault active_pressure_signals count. Score anchored to CEU grounding, not signal values.

key_facts_recorded.structural_fix: fastapi_conformance_path in source_manifest routes orchestrator to pre-computed canonical artifacts
